American bullfrog.gloss: a large frog native to North America

American robin.gloss: a North American songbird with a reddish-orange breast

axolotl.gloss: a salamander that keeps its feathery external gills as an adult

bald eagle.gloss: a large bird of prey with a white head and tail

box turtle.gloss: a small land turtle with a high, domed shell that can close tightly

cello.gloss: a large stringed instrument played upright with a bow

chameleon.gloss: a lizard known for changing colour and having a long tongue

cock.gloss: an adult male chicken; a rooster

desert grassland whiptail lizard.gloss: a slender, long-tailed lizard of North American grasslands

fire salamander.gloss: a black salamander with bright yellow markings

flamingo.gloss: a tall wading bird with pink plumage and long legs

great grey owl.gloss: a very large grey owl with a round, ringed facial disc

great white shark.gloss: a large shark with a grey back and white underside

indigo bunting.gloss: a small songbird; the breeding male is bright blue

loggerhead sea turtle.gloss: a large sea turtle with a big head and a reddish-brown shell

marimba.gloss: a wooden xylophone-like instrument played with mallets

mud turtle.gloss: a small freshwater turtle with a dull, smooth shell

ostrich.gloss: the largest living bird; flightless, with a long neck and legs

stingray.gloss: a flat-bodied fish with a long, whip-like tail

tiger shark.gloss: a large shark with dark vertical stripes on its sides
